title: helmia fracta
intro: Helmia fracta, also known as African heliotrope, is a plant species native to South Africa, characterized by its vibrant purple flowers and attractive foliage. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with fever, coughs, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Helmia fracta include its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can help combat infections and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried powder, which can be used to treat various ailments, including colds, flu, and bronchitis.
